', scriptToInject + ''); const blob = new Blob([finalHtml], {type: 'text/html'}); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = 'index.html'; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); document.body.removeChild(a); } function updateQty(id, v) { const i = items.find(x => x.id === id); i.qty = Math.max(0, (i.qty||0)+v); render(); updateList(); } function manualQty(id) { const i = items.find(x => x.id === id); i.qty = parseInt(document.getElementById('q'+id).value) || 0; updateList(); } function updateList() { document.getElementById('resultText').value = items.filter(i => i.qty > 0).map(i => `${i.name}=${i.qty}`).join('\n'); } function copyList() { const t = document.getElementById('resultText'); if(!t.value) return; t.select(); document.execCommand('copy'); alert("تم النسخ!"); } function toggleTextEdit() { const t = document.getElementById('resultText'); if (t.hasAttribute('readonly')) { t.removeAttribute('readonly'); t.focus(); } else { t.setAttribute('readonly', 'true'); } } function clearAll() { if(confirm("تصفير؟")){ items.forEach(i=>i.qty=0); render(); updateList(); } } window.onload = init;
